description_long: This object is a retro-style electronic device with a rectangular, low-profile body, primarily colored in off-white with gray and blue accents. The front panel features the brand name 'Dendy JUNIOR' and includes a set of control buttons, including a D-pad, two red circular buttons, and two black circular buttons, as well as 'SELECT' and 'START' buttons. The top surface has a central slot, likely for cartridge or disc insertion, and raised side rails. The rear side includes two red ports and a black power input, while the sides are mostly plain except for the control panel. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage gaming consoles, with a plastic exterior and visible seams and buttons.
description: A retro, off-white and gray electronic device with a control panel, cartridge slot, and rear ports, resembling a vintage gaming console.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Dendy JUNIOR' branding and the main face of the device with a central slot and raised side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the control panel with D-pad, red and black buttons, and 'SELECT' and 'START' buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two red ports and a black power input, with the back panel's simple design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the control panel from a different angle, emphasizing the button layout and side profile.
